creator: alt2600@icloud.com
text:
Created attachment 256607
docproj_allow_full_gnuplot.diff

Was looking to have local version of FreeBSD docs for reference and noticed that docproj wants gnuplot-lite, and that conflicts with the full gnuplot install I use for my workstation. This patch adds a knob GNUPLOT to use the full version instead of lite version for run depends. This produced the en language docs without issue in html and pdf. Hoping this can be added so folks running workstations with gnuplot use can locally build documents. 

Not sure if there is a more elegant way of handling letting both work without using a knob
